because.text: Verdict recorded, architecture stays open until the full gate. P0a verified against the oracle and sharper than filed: interfere is non-associative - (w1*w2)*w3 = {8192,2096,-922} vs w1*(w2*w3) = {8192,0,-591} for identical operands, grouping alone decides audibility, so an interference fold is an ordering-and-grouping policy wearing algebra's clothes; plus Left-Dominance phase capture via hash grinding (junk evidence entries are free nonce space). Maintainer F3 leaning WITHDRAWN. P0b confirmed: ski@v1 checks are public and term-bound by design, so one expensive check amortizes across unlimited copycat assertions - criterion 4's ski candidate dead as written; narrowing recorded as an open question for remaining reviewers: personalized-term pricing (term embeds asserting actor id, copied checks fail against a different asserter) - attack or confirm; if it falls, weight is social (threshold co-signatures) per Gemini's amendment. Category-error framing (compute algebra != social consensus) matches the project's own TRUTH/NAVIGATION discipline. Codex review in flight blind to this one; Kimi follows with both as priors.

subject.note: Gemini ADR-006 gate review 1: F1, reject F2/F3 - two P0s vs the proposal's own leanings, both verified; maintainer F3 leaning withdrawn
